tracks.suno_lyrics:
[Verse 1]
Windows down on a two-lane road
Your boots up on the dash, sun turning gold
Radio playing our favorite song
Baby this is where we both belong

[Pre-Chorus]
Every mile feels like a memory
Every sunset looks like you and me

[Chorus]
Backroad summer, firefly nights
Your hand in mine under county lights
We don't need a map, we don't need a plan
Just your heartbeat and this promised land
Backroad summer, take me home
To every dirt road we've ever known

[Verse 2]
Tailgate down by the riverside
Bare feet in the water, nothing to hide
You laugh and the whole world disappears
I'd trade a thousand cities for you right here

[Pre-Chorus]
Every mile feels like a memory
Every sunset looks like you and me

[Chorus]
Backroad summer, firefly nights
Your hand in mine under county lights
We don't need a map, we don't need a plan
Just your heartbeat and this promised land
Backroad summer, take me home
To every dirt road we've ever known

[Bridge]
When the world gets loud
We'll find our quiet
Just you, me, and the sky
No need to fight it

[Outro]
Backroad summer, backroad summer
Take me home

tracks.suno_lyrics:
[Verse 1]
Alarm at five, the city still asleep
Got a vision in my head I'm about to keep
They said impossible, I said watch me prove it
Every setback is a setup, I refuse to lose it

[Pre-Chorus]
Brick by brick I built it
Every doubt I killed it
This empire's mine

[Chorus]
Empire mindset, never settle for less
Every morning is a war and I choose success
Empire mindset, built it from the ground
They sleep on me but I wake up and go another round
Empire mindset, legacy in progress
Watch me turn this grind into greatness

[Verse 2]
Black coffee, white board, blue ocean strategy
Turned my bedroom into a whole academy
No investors, no excuses, just the work
Turned the pain into a product, made the struggle work

[Pre-Chorus]
Brick by brick I built it
Every doubt I killed it
This empire's mine

Every morning is a war and I choose success

They sleep on me but I wake up and go another round

Watch me turn this grind into greatness

That's the math of the great
You want the crown, earn the weight

[Outro]
